Siddhartha Venkatayogi

  • About Me
  • Programming
  • Art
  • Blog

Work for my project in Texas Luminescence, Chrom.io (text-to-color palette generator). This project did get scrapped because the end product was pretty basic, but I learned a lot experimenting and trying things out!


The main thing I did was design and execute an RLVR fine-tuning protocol to improve color palette generation in small LLMs. Used deterministic reward metrics for aesthetic output, and serverless LoRA fine-tuning on the Fireworks.ai platform


Improved Qwen3-8B palette similarity scores by 13% over baseline!


Need to do a write-up of this project eventually because it was really interesting, but basically we used this paper + fine tuning to get SOTA performance.


Github Repository!

Austin, Texas

University of Texas at Austin
